sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84994" key="polukthmosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-κτημοσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n84994.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">great wealth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.110</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.163</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">204</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
